title: With or Without You
meaning_summary: Its emotional directness and instantly recognizable arrangement help it keep earning through repeat listening and catalog reuse.
revenue_drivers: Classic-rock and broad catalog playlists support recurring streaming.
Cross-generational familiarity keeps the song discoverable.
Sync use and event-driven replay can lift the baseline.

earnings.assumptions: Estimate keeps the headline range as the artist-side figure and models gross track, label, publishing, and songwriter lanes from that conservative annual range.

ownership.master_owner: Likely controlled through the recording label or distributor unless a specific rights sale is known
ownership.publishing_owner: Writer and publisher splits affect the publishing share shown here
ownership.catalog_sale_status: No specific catalog sale adjustment is modeled for this track
ownership.notes: With or Without You is modeled from public-facing catalog behavior and conservative rights-split assumptions, not from audited royalty statements.
